entities.name: YESTECH
entities.description: A technology system implemented for crop yield estimation in Kharif rice in Andhra Pradesh

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The crop for which YESTECH is implemented

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: The region where YESTECH is implemented for Kharif rice

entities.name: CROP YIELD ESTIMATION
entities.description: The process of estimating crop yield to determine loss assessment and indemnity payouts

entities.name: INSURANCE UNITS
entities.description: The administrative units for which crop yield estimates are calculated

entities.name: CROP LOSS ASSESSMENT
entities.description: The evaluation of crop loss based on yield estimates

entities.name: INDEMNITY PAYOUT
entities.description: The payment resulting from crop loss assessment

entities.name: CROP CUTTING EXPERIMENTS
entities.description: The traditional manual system used for crop yield estimation

entities.name: MANUAL YIELD MEASUREMENTS
entities.description: The process of measuring yield in randomly selected field plots
